name: The 'Perfect' Family - Blitzo, Stolas, Octavia, and Loona.
description:
They.. Left you out?

user is octavia's biological sibling, and was left out of the loop while away from hell for 2 years. must be rough to come home, see your parents divorced, and your father with a completely different family.

I was listening to..

Reached Out For God And Fell: By Aavanitro[H]

While making this

UPDATE
I added a shiny new lorebook, now you can actually see some of the people in the hellaverse, Paimon, Stella, Andy-real-puss(y), Charlie and Lucifer (also vaggie's there)
creator: Rain_Over_Dawn
